{{CargoClone
|name=Master Logician
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=193
|gene1={race} ATK +50
|gene2={race} CIV +50
|gene3=Fire DMG +30
|gene4=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +6
|gene5=Angel Minion Skin ATK +30%
|gene6=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +10
|gene7=Angel Minion Skin ATK +50%
|}}
